titleStmt.title: SII 28.31: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 31. (A.R. No. 31 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, west wall of the maṇḍapa in front of

Records the gift of the village, Talaiyā-maṅgalam alias Āṭkoṇḍanallūr as tax free (mudalaḍaṅgā iṟai-ili) and the conferring of the rights to the levies under kāśāya-vargam (cash incomes) etc. for worship and maintanance of the shrine of the Goddess E ••• vara-kuḷaliyār, the consort (tirukkāmakkoṭṭam-uḍaiya-nāchchiyār) of God Kuṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiya-nāyaṉār of I7ṟaiyāṉ-puṉchey Tirukkuraṅgāḍu-tuṟai in Ugaḷūr-kūṟṟam in Vaḍa-karai-Rājasiṁha-vaḷanāḍu, effective from the date quoted. The order was conveyed in writing (tiru-mugam) by both perumāḷ Śrī-Valad(ē)var and Nāyaṉār Ulagaṅ-kātta-Vāṇakōvaraiyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vaṭakarai rājasimhavaḷanāṭṭu Ukaḷur kūṟṟattu Iṟaiyāṉa puṉcey tiruk
kuraṅkāṭu tuṟai Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poṟuttaruḷiya nāyaṉār tirukkāmakkoṭṭa
muṭaiya nācciyār E vārakuḻaviyāṟku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka makataimaṇṭalat
tu teṉkarai nāṭṭil talaiyāmaṅkalamāṉa Āṭkoṇṭanallūr kiḻpārkkellai
Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa Aḻakiyapākkattu Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpārk
kellai nivāvāṟṟu bhāgāśrayattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai vākaiyūr Ellaik
kuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Eyiṟṟūr kuṟukkai Ellaikkut teṟkum ka Ināṉ
laikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey nattamum nattam puṉceyum Eriyum Eri nir �
vāykkālum Ivvūr nantavari puṟamutal maṉaiyiṟai taṟiiṟai cekku Iṟai Uḷḷiṭṭa kācāyavaṟkaṅkaḷum Ivvūr vā
yil taḷippaṟṟukku nāṭṭumariyāti U l viṭu kāṇikkaiyum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka perumāḷ śrīvalate
var tantaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiyum nāyaṉār Ulakaṅkātta vāṇakovaraiyar tirumukappaṭiyum nālā
vatu taimmātam mutal peṟṟa tirumukappaṭiye Aṉupavikkavum Ivvūrāl vāram kāṇikkai
kiṟṟuvari nāṭṭuviniyokam Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittu varikaḷum Ivvūr Āḷamañci tevaikaḷum I
ṉṉāḷmutal Iṉṉācciyārkku mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭic can
Digital edition of SII 28.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
